title: **📡 Echo Oracle**
description: Synchronize your network with the information flows from the outside world and receive revelations processed by my analytical core.
news_buttons_title: 📰 **Select a capsule to deploy its content:**
news_components_unavailable:
📰 **Information modules fragmented**

Try restarting the request in the next cycle.

dropdown.method_flat_description: Reflects all echoes with my reflections added
dropdown.method_general_description: Evaluates echoes based on preset logical guidelines
dropdown.list_premises_description: Inspects the evaluation rules I have memorized
dropdown.watcher_frequency_description: Sets the time interval between each network scan
dropdown.watcher_run_now_description: Forces the core to scan information nodes instantly
dropdown.feeds_by_category_description: Explore sources associated with a domain
dropdown.list_categories_description: Shows the large blocks of information available
dropdown.subscribe_category_description: Establishes a link with a <domain> [optional specific node]
dropdown.unsubscribe_category_description: Breaks the link with the <domain> [optional specific node]
dropdown.add_premises_description: Provides a new rule for me to analyze news
dropdown.list_keywords_description: Reviews the keywords I am tracking
dropdown.add_keywords_description: Adds new terms to intercept echoes
dropdown.delete_keywords_description: Frees my memory of obsolete keywords
dropdown.modify_watcher_frequency_description: Alters the time constant for network surveillance
dropdown.force_watcher_channel_description: Executes the sweep and dumps data in the current room
dropdown.force_personal_subscriptions_description: Executes the sweep and sends echoes to your terminal
dropdown.option_general_description: Heuristic analysis guided by logical premises
dropdown.categories_description: Lists the network blocks available for exploration
dropdown.subscribe_categories_description: Creates multiple links under the {method} filter
dropdown.premises_description: Evaluates the reasoning rules imposed on the core
